name: Florida Agency for Health Care Administration
notes: Simple license number search form. Returns status and expiry date.

name: Florida Department of Health — Medical Quality Assurance
notes: ASP.NET MVC form. GET for CSRF token, POST license number, follow redirect to detail page. Covers Medical Board, Pharmacy, Podiatrists, Optometry, PT, OT, Orthotics/Prosthetics, Respiratory.

name: Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation
notes: License verification by license number. Straightforward GET request.

name: Georgia Composite Medical Board
notes: reCAPTCHA-protected. Use manual-assist mode (human solves CAPTCHA in browser). lookupUrl is the deep-link to the search form.

name: Georgia Secretary of State Professional Licensing
notes: Per reference sheet: username and password required. No credentials available; auto-routes to manual.

name: Texas Department of State Health Services
notes: Site now requires login at /datamart/mainMenu.do. No credentials available for demo; auto-routes to manual.

name: Texas Health and Human Services
notes: Google reCAPTCHA v2. Use manual-assist (human solves CAPTCHA). lookupUrl same as website for now.

name: North Carolina Medical Board
notes: Per reference sheet: username and password required. URL currently returns 404; auto-routes to manual.

name: Ohio State Medical Board
notes: eLicense portal. Requires selecting license type from dropdown first.

name: Pennsylvania Department of State
notes: PALS portal with Cloudflare challenge. Use manual-assist (human clears challenge). lookupUrl is the SPA search route.

name: New York Office of the Professions
notes: License verification search. Note: HTTP (not HTTPS) — verify still active.

name: California Department of Health Care Services
notes: Multi-step form with county selection required before license lookup.

name: Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation
notes: ASP.NET form. Requires posting ViewState. Use requests + BeautifulSoup.

name: New Jersey Division of Consumer Affairs
notes: Standard myLicense portal. Consistent across multiple license types.

name: New Jersey DCA — mylicense.com unified verification
notes: mylicense.com ASP.NET portal. Search by license number, follow detail link. Covers Medical Examiners, Pharmacy, Optometry, Respiratory, Orthotics/Prosthetics, Ophthalmic Dispensers under one URL.
